channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Verstappen captures 4th F1 championship after Mercedes sweep of Las Vegas Grand Prix
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Max Verstappen cruised to a fourth consecutive Formula 1 championship on Saturday night by finishing fifth in the Las Vegas Grand Prix. Verstappen needed only to finish ahead of Lando Norris of McLaren to give Red Bull a fourth straight driver championship.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Utes out of bowl game contention after 31-28 loss
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Down to their fifth-string quarterback, the Utes football team almost pulled out a spectacular comeback against #22 Iowa State, only to lose its seventh straight game, 31-28.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Arnold, Robinson run for more than 100 yards as Oklahoma stuns No. 7 Alabama 24-3
item.description: Xavier Robinson ran for career highs of 107 yards and two touchdowns, and Oklahoma stunned No. 7 Alabama 24-3 to become bowl eligible and deal a severe blow to the Crimson Tide’s chances of receiving a College Football Playoff berth.
item.dc:creator: Cliff Brunt, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Penguins' Crosby scores 600th NHL goal
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — Sidney Crosby would’ve liked his 600th NHL goal to come in a win Crosby became the 21sth player to reach the mark when scored in the second period of the Pittsburgh Penguins' 6-1 loss to the Utah Hockey Club on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: DAN SCIFO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Barnes leads Aggies to 41-20 win over SDSU
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - After a rough start to the season, Utah State is finishing strong. Bryson Barnes accounted for 323 yards and four touchdowns to lead Utah State over San Diego State 41-20 on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Trump Cabinet pick Scott Turner scored only NFL pick 6 in lone bright moment of historically awful season
item.description: Scott Turner, a seventh-round pick out of Illinois, played for the Chargers in 2000 on a team that went 1-15, one of the worst in NFL history.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Silver Bowl champs! McClymonds too much for Oakland in section title showdown
item.description: 2024 Oakland Section championship: McClymonds wins 15th consecutive Silver Bowl as Berell Staples throws for two touchdowns
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: After fans storm field early, No. 21 Arizona St stops Hail Mary try for 28-23 win over No. 14 BYU
item.description: TEMPE, Ariz. (AP) — Cam Skattebo was the workhorse once again for Arizona State, carrying the Sun Devils on his back by rushing for 147 yards and three touchdowns. His reward was a well-earned celebration with fans. Twice. Skattebo had another big game, Sam Leavitt threw for 247 yards and No.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Devin Neal scores 4 times, Kansas beats No. 16 Colorado 37-21 as Buffs' Big 12 title hopes take hit
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Devin Neal ran for 207 yards and three touchdowns, caught four passes for 80 yards and another score, and led Kansas to a 37-21 victory over No. 16 Colorado on Saturday that dealt a big blow to the Buffaloes' hopes of playing for the Big 12 title.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: San Jose State volleyball gets first-round bye at MW Tournament; Spartans scheduled to open against team that refused to play them in regular season
item.description: The Spartans are set to face either Utah State or Boise State in the second round, are waiting to see if a Colorado judge will allow alleged transgender athlete to play.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: BYU comeback falls short at ASU, 28-23
item.description: TEMPE, Ariz. (ABC4 Sports) - BYU's offense took too late to get going, and the Cougars' chances at a Big 12 Championship took a serious hit with a 28-23 loss at Arizona State Saturday afternoon.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Stephen A. Smith's claim that Giants reached out to ESPN about Elle Duncan's criticism is false: report
item.description: No one from the New York Giants reached out to ESPN complaining about Elle Duncan's segment criticizing Daniel Jones despite Stephen A Smith's claim otherwise, according to reports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Michigan football secures bowl eligibility in 44-point blowout over Northwestern on Senior Day
item.description: The Michigan Wolverines are bowl-eligible after blowing out the Northwestern Wildcats 50-6 on Senior Day.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Carr, Local 4

item.title: Judge says ex-coach was within 'protected speech' in opposing trans athlete's inclusion in girls competition
item.description: During his fight to get his coaching job back, John Parks was told by a federal judge he was within his free speech rights when voicing a stance on transgender athletes in girls sports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: No. 24 Illinois stuns Rutgers on Bryant's 40-yard TD reception with 4 seconds left
item.description: PISCATAWAY, N.J. (AP) — Trailing by one at the 40-yard line with 14 seconds to play and no timeouts, Illinois coach Bret Bielema sent in a play known as “church” to Luke Altmyer. The quarterback was to hit a receiver who was to go to the ground immediately.
item.dc:creator: TOM CANAVAN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Florida knocks No. 9 Ole Miss out of College Football Playoff contention, 24-17 in the Swamp
item.description: GAINESVILLE, Fla. (AP) — Coach Billy Napier and his team did something no one at Florida had done in nearly two decades. It could be the turning point for a once-proud program that clearly slipped in recent years.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No. 2 Ohio State takes control in the 2nd half and runs over No. 5 Indiana 38-15
item.description: COLUMBUS, Ohio (AP) — Will Howard passed for two touchdowns and rushed for another, TreVeyon Henderson ran for a score and No. 2 Ohio State beat previously undefeated No. 5 Indiana 38-15 on Saturday. All Ohio State (10-1, 7-1 Big Ten, CFP No.
item.dc:creator: MITCH STACY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Florida delivers crushing blow to No. 9 Ole Miss' College Football Playoff hopes with upset win
item.description: The Florida Gators delivered a crushing blow to the Ole Miss Rebels' playoff hopes, upsetting the Rebels 24-17 Saturday by sealing the win with two big interceptions late.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NFL insider rips ex-Titans coach for admitting years later to feeding him bogus story before firing
item.description: Former Tennessee Titans head coach Mike Mularkey got back at his fromer employer in 2018 at the expense of NFL insider Ian Rapoport and his reputation, and Rapoport was not pleased.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Conor McGregor lashes out on rape accuser in social media rant after being found liable for assault
item.description: A day after being found liable of assault during a sexual encounter, former UFC champion Conor McGregor called his a accuser a "vicious liar.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Man City's statistics hit new low after Tottenham humiliation
item.description: MANCHESTER, England (AP) — The statistics just keep getting worse for Manchester City and Pep Guardiola. City’s Premier League title challenge took a major blow on Saturday after being thrashed 4-0 at home by Tottenham.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Former Giants star Sterling Shepard reveals details on team's culture amid fallout from Daniel Jones' exit
item.description: Sterling Shepard, who spent his first eight seasons with the New York Giants, does not appear to be fond of quarterback Daniel Jones' unceremonious exit.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NFL says Packers blocked game-winning field was legal play, despite Bears’ protests: reports
item.description: The NFL reportedly told the Chicago Bears that Cairo Santos' blocked game-winning field-goal attempt was a legal play by the Green Bay Packers.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bulls host the Grizzlies in non-conference play
item.description: Memphis Grizzlies (9-7, ninth in the Western Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (7-10, seventh in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Saturday, 8 p.m. EST BETMGM SPORTSBOOK LINE: Grizzlies -5.5; over/under is 242.5 BOTTOM LINE: The Memphis Grizzlies visit the Chicago Bulls in a non-conference matchup.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Angel Yin holes 3 long putts for 2-shot lead in LPGA finale. Nelly Korda shoots 66 to trail by 4
item.description: NAPLES, Fla. (AP) — Angel Yin rammed in a 30-foot par putt on her opening hole, setting the tone for a day of big putts and 3-under 69 that gave her a two-shot lead Friday in the CME Group Tour Championship and the chase for the $4 million prize.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Russell puts Mercedes on pole at Las Vegas and Verstappen nips Norris in championship battle
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — George Russell put Mercedes on the pole for the Las Vegas Grand Prix in an upset over teammate Lewis Hamilton, who had been considered the favorite but struggled in Friday night's final qualifying session.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mike Evans trending towards playing against the Giants on Sunday
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers are looking to get back on track after four straight losses against the Giants, who swapped starting quarterbacks after losing five in a row.
item.dc:creator: WFLA, NBC
